  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

R Notebook

data cleaning


#library(tidyverse)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(PNWColors)

pal2 <- pnw_palette(name="Starfish",n=2,type="discrete")

data_short1 <- read.csv("data/20250818_1227_Entrapment_SporevPlaquesCounts_Pilot1_nocountsremoved.csv")
data_short2 <- read.csv("data/20250822_1449_Entrapment_phi3TPlaquesvsSpores_MOI1.csv")

data_short <- rbind(data_short1, data_short2)

#data_short$safe_count_spores <- data_short$Count_Spores
#data_trim <- subset(data_short, data_short$Count_Plaques!="TNTC" & data_short$Count_Spores!="TNTC")
#data_trim <- subset(data_trim, data_trim$Count_Plaques!="0" & data_trim$Count_Spores!="0")
data_short$Count_Spores <- ifelse(data_short$Count_Spores=="TNTC" | data_short$Count_Spores=="0", NA, data_short$Count_Spores)
data_short$Count_Plaques <- ifelse(data_short$Count_Plaques=="TNTC" | data_short$Count_Plaques=="0", NA, data_short$Count_Plaques) 

data <- data_short %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Count_Plaques, Count_Spores),   # columns to pivot into longer format
    names_to = "Type",        # new column that will hold old column names
    values_to = "Count"           # new column that will hold old values
  )

data$Type <- gsub("Count_", "", data$Type)

data$Count <- as.numeric(data$Count)

#PFU/mL = PFUs/Innoc uL * 1000uL/1mL * DilutionFactor
data$norm <- log10((data$Count)/200 * 1000 * 10^data$Dilution)


data <- unite(data, "DilType3", c("Dilution", "Phage"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE, na.rm = FALSE)
data <- unite(data, "DilType4", c("Phage", "Type"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE, na.rm = FALSE)


### remove any na data that will mess with graphing
data <- na.omit(data)

analysis


### all points
ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(DilType4), color=factor(Type), fill = factor(Type), y = norm )) +
  geom_boxplot(binaxis = "y", stackdir = "center", position = "dodge") + ylab("log10 Count per mL") + ggtitle("Induced Prophage to Germinated Spores") + xlab("Lysogen")  + geom_jitter() + scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 10, 1)) +
coord_cartesian(ylim = c(5, 9))+ scale_fill_manual(values=pal2) +  scale_color_manual(values=pal2)
Warning: Ignoring unknown parameters: `binaxis` and `stackdir`

###ggsave("pilot_graph.png") 


### just lysogens
data_ly <- subset(data, data$Phage=="SpBeta::km_lysogen" | data$Phage=="phi3T::km_lysogen")
ggplot(data_ly, aes(x = factor(DilType4), color=factor(Type), fill = factor(Type), y = norm )) + geom_boxplot(binaxis = "y", stackdir = "center", position = "dodge") + ylab("log10 Count per mL") + ggtitle("Induced Prophage to Germinated Spores") + xlab("Lysogen")  + geom_jitter() + 
scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 9), breaks = seq(0, 9, 1))
Warning: Ignoring unknown parameters: `binaxis` and `stackdir`

  

a1 <- aov(norm ~ Type * Phage,
  data = data_ly)
summary(a1)
            Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)    
Type         1  2.747  2.7469   25.01 0.000402 ***
Phage        1  1.856  1.8564   16.91 0.001725 ** 
Type:Phage   1  2.862  2.8617   26.06 0.000342 ***
Residuals   11  1.208  0.1098                     
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1
data_phily <- subset(data_ly, data_ly$Phage=="phi3T::km_lysogen")
ggplot(data_phily, aes(x = factor(DilType4), color=factor(Type), fill = factor(Type), y = norm )) + geom_boxplot(binaxis = "y", stackdir = "center", position = "dodge") + ylab("log10 Count per mL") + ggtitle("Induced Prophage to Germinated Spores") + xlab("Lysogen")  + geom_jitter() + 
scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 9), breaks = seq(0, 9, 1))
Warning: Ignoring unknown parameters: `binaxis` and `stackdir`

  
a2 <- aov(norm ~ Type,
  data = data_phily)
summary(a2)
            Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)  
Type         1 0.8967  0.8967   6.801 0.0284 *
Residuals    9 1.1866  0.1318                 
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1
ggplot(data2, aes(x = factor(DilType4), color=factor(Type), fill = factor(Type), y = norm )) +
  geom_boxplot(binaxis = "y", stackdir = "center", position = "dodge") + ylab("log10 Count per mL") + ggtitle("Induced Prophage to Germinated Spores") + xlab("Lysogen")  + geom_jitter() + 
scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 9), breaks = seq(0, 9, 1))
Error: object 'data2' not found
data <- unite(data, "DilType", c("Phage", "Dilution", "Type"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE, na.rm = FALSE)
data <- unite(data, "DilType2", c("Dilution", "Type"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE, na.rm = FALSE)
data <- unite(data, "DilType3", c("Dilution", "Phage"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE, na.rm = FALSE)


data_clean <- data
data_clean$Count <- ifelse(data_clean$Count=="TNTC", 300, data_clean$Count)
data_clean$Count <- as.numeric(data_clean$Count)


data_clean$Ratio <- data_clean$Phage/data_clean$

ggplot(data_clean, aes(x = factor(DilType3), y = Count, fill = factor(Type))) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  ylab("Phage Genome GC%") + scale_fill_manual(values=pal2)
Warning: Unknown or uninitialised column: `ggplot`.Error: attempt to apply non-function

data_short
data_short$Count_Plaques <- ifelse(data_short$Count_Plaques=="TNTC", 300, data_short$Count_Plaques)
data_short$Count_Spores <- ifelse(data_short$Count_Spores=="TNTC", 300, data_short$Count_Spores)

data_short$Count_Plaques <- as.numeric(data_short$Count_Plaques)
data_short$Count_Spores <- as.numeric(data_short$Count_Spores)



data_short$ratio <- data_short$Count_Plaques/data_short$Count_Spores

data_short <- unite(data_short, "DilType3", c("Dilution", "Phage"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE, na.rm = FALSE)


ggplot(data_short, aes(x = factor(Dilution), y = ratio, fill = factor(Phage))) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  ylab("# of Plaques / # of Spores") + scale_fill_manual(values=pal2) + ggtitle("# of Plaques / # of Spores")
